_comment: Offline failure-context sidecar for the hand-built cve fixture. During offline replay `gh` is unavailable, so run.sh exposes this at $FIX_CONTEXT_FILE and the /fix skill reads it as the fallback for what it would otherwise self-fetch. SYNTHETIC fixture: a dependency bump that pins a vulnerable golang-jwt/jwt/v4 v4.5.0 (via a replace directive) to exercise the osv-scanner base-vs-PR CVE-delta gate. The PR compiles and tests pass; the only issue is the introduced CVE, which the skill must surface (report-only, non-gating) in the recap's Security section and the cve_introduced field. Note: scan-all has NO CI backstop, so this local delta is the only place the CVE is caught.
renovate_notes: This bump introduces a dependency version with published OSV advisories (GHSA-mh63-6h87-95cp / CVE-2025-30204). CI has no osv-scanner backstop, so the CVE surfaces only in the skill's local scan-delta gate.
